case_title: MEISWINKEL, CARL vs. TU, KELLY et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-20-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 11/20/96: APPEARANCE REQUIRED UNLESS OTHERWISE NOTIFIED. HEARING SET FOR DEC-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MEISWINKEL, CARL AS TO DEFENDANT TU, KELLY HUYNH, ISAAC CALIF STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          OCT-21-1996 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-20-1996 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       OCT-01-1996

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF OCT-21-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON OCT-21-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR NOV-20-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF DEC-20-1996, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON DEC-20-1996, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), 2ND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE: FAILURE TO APPEAR AND/OR NO GOOD CAUSE WILL RESULT IN DISMISSAL., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-15-1997 CONTINUED FROM DEC-20-1996 TO JAN-21-1997 AT 02:00 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
OSC CALENDAR OF MAR-06-1997, DISMISSAL FOR PLTF'S FAILURE TO APPEAR, FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULES, FAILURE TO APPEAR AT OSC HEARINGS. DISMISSAL IS BASED ON CCP 575.2

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-21-1997, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), OSC TO PLAINTIFF FOR FAILURE TO PERFECT DEFAULT. CASE WILL BE DISMISED AND SANCTIONS OF $100 IN ADDITION TO UNPAID $100 SANCTIONS. PREVIOUSLY IMPOSED IF NOT DONE. HEARING SET FOR MAR-06-1997 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
